pages.text: Pour $(l:goety:food/ruby_syrup)Ruby Syrup$() and honey into a cauldron, sprinkle in sugar, then add Condensed Emerald. After eating it, you might absorb its power to enhance your spellcasting...$(br)For the consumer:$(br)$(li)10 minutes of Spell Mastery III$(li)8 minutes of Regeneration II$(li)15 minutes of Nourishment$(br)Permanently increases your Potency level by 1 after consumption, up to three times.

"Eat this candy, not merely to taste its unique sweetness.$(br)More importantly, with your saliva, your tongue, your taste buds, profane the former nobility all together.$(br)Swap reverence for vulgarity, connect preciousness with ordinariness.$(br)Only then will this arcane progress and deliciousness be so crimson and alluring."
